reviews.comment:
Buena atención, sanitarios en perfecto estado, rico cafe con leche, amplia playa de estacionamiento, bien atendido en el expendio de combustibles

(Translated by Google)
Good service, restrooms in perfect condition, delicious coffee with milk, ample parking, and good service at the gas station.

reviews.comment:
Muy buen servicio del Acá. Siempre priorizamos las paradas en sus dependencias por la limpieza de los baños y la cordialidad de los empleados

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service at Acá. We always prioritize stopping at their facilities because of the cleanliness of the restrooms and the friendliness of the employees.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURXN091M2pnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Buenos días
La atención muy buena en el despacho de combustible.

De paso almorce en el servicentro .
Muy rico el lomito al.plato completo
Ensaladas todo muy rico.
Un poco excesivo los precios

(Translated by Google)
Good morning.
The service at the gas station was excellent.

I stopped for lunch there.
The steak sandwich was delicious. The salads were all very tasty.

The prices are a bit high.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURXdFBPcS13RRAB

reviews.comment:
El ACA de Rio Tala es casi una parada obligatoria en cada viaje hacia el.norte. Las instalaciones impecables , lugar para estacionar y un gran parque. Típico del ACA. Calidad y buen servicio. El bar es caro.

(Translated by Google)
The ACA in Rio Tala is practically a mandatory stop on every trip north. The facilities are immaculate, there's plenty of parking, and a large park. Typical ACA: quality and good service. The bar is expensive.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5aXNHTmFREAE

reviews.comment:
Buen servicio, aunque un poco de demora al cargar combustible, se puede pagar con la app ypf y tarjetas, los baños muy limpios, ideal para hacer una parada en el viaje.

(Translated by Google)
Good service, although there was a slight delay when refueling. You can pay with the YPF app and cards. The bathrooms are very clean, making it ideal for a stop on your trip.
